gaia.error_message:
Cannot parse query '-- HOU-COMPACT Gaia DR3 spectroscopic SB1 pilot, version 5
-- Frozen 2026-07-22. Do not edit in place; create v6 for any correction.
--
-- Relative to v4, this query adds Gaia image/photometry/variability diagnostics that
-- can reveal blending, partial resolution, source duplication, nearby contamination,
-- or an already-published variability product. These fields are audit evidence only;
-- none is a standalone rejection criterion.

SELECT TOP 5000
    n.solution_id,
    n.source_id,
    n.nss_solution_type,
    g.ra AS gaia_ra,
    g.dec AS gaia_dec,
    g.ref_epoch AS gaia_ref_epoch,
    g.parallax AS gaia_parallax,
    g.parallax_error AS gaia_parallax_error,
    g.parallax_over_error,
    g.pmra,
    g.pmra_error,
    g.pmdec,
    g.pmdec_error,
    g.ruwe,
    g.astrometric_gof_al,
    g.astrometric_excess_noise,
    g.astrometric_excess_noise_sig,
    g.astrometric_params_solved,
    g.duplicated_source,
    g.ipd_gof_harmonic_amplitude,
    g.ipd_gof_harmonic_phase,
    g.ipd_frac_multi_peak,
    g.ipd_frac_odd_win,
    g.phot_g_n_obs,
    g.phot_bp_n_obs,
    g.phot_rp_n_obs,
    g.phot_g_mean_mag,
    g.phot_bp_mean_mag,
    g.phot_rp_mean_mag,
    g.bp_rp,
    g.phot_bp_rp_excess_factor,
    g.phot_bp_n_contaminated_transits,
    g.phot_bp_n_blended_transits,
    g.phot_rp_n_contaminated_transits,
    g.phot_rp_n_blended_transits,
    g.phot_proc_mode,
    g.phot_variable_flag,
    g.has_xp_continuous,
    g.has_xp_sampled,
    g.has_rvs,
    g.has_epoch_photometry,
    g.has_epoch_rv,
    g.non_single_star,
    g.radial_velocity AS gaia_mean_rv,
    g.radial_velocity_error AS gaia_mean_rv_error,
    g.rv_nb_transits,
    g.rv_nb_deblended_transits,
    g.teff_gspphot,
    g.teff_gspphot_lower,
    g.teff_gspphot_upper,
    g.logg_gspphot,
    g.logg_gspphot_lower,
    g.logg_gspphot_upper,
    g.mh_gspphot,
    g.mh_gspphot_lower,
    g.mh_gspphot_upper,
    g.radius_gspphot,
    g.radius_gspphot_lower,
    g.radius_gspphot_upper,
    n.period,
    n.period_error,
    n.t_periastron,
    n.t_periastron_error,
    n.eccentricity,
    n.eccentricity_error,
    n.arg_periastron,
    n.arg_periastron_error,
    n.center_of_mass_velocity,
    n.center_of_mass_velocity_error,
    n.semi_amplitude_primary,
    n.semi_amplitude_primary_error,
    n.rv_n_obs_primary,
    n.rv_n_good_obs_primary,
    n.conf_spectro_period,
    n.obj_func,
    n.goodness_of_fit,
    n.efficiency,
    n.significance,
    n.flags,
    n.bit_index,
    n.corr_vec,
    n.period * n.semi_amplitude_primary * n.semi_amplitude_primary
        * n.semi_amplitude_primary AS pk1_cubed_proxy
FROM gaiadr3.nss_two_body_orbit AS n
JOIN gaiadr3.gaia_source AS g
    ON n.source_id = g.source_id
WHERE n.nss_solution_type IN ('SB1', 'SB1C')
  AND n.period IS NOT NULL
  AND n.period > 0
  AND n.period_error IS NOT NULL
  AND n.semi_amplitude_primary IS NOT NULL
  AND n.semi_amplitude_primary > 0
  AND n.semi_amplitude_primary_error IS NOT NULL
  AND n.semi_amplitude_primary_error > 0
  AND n.significance IS NOT NULL
  AND n.significance >= 5
ORDER BY n.period * n.semi_amplitude_primary * n.semi_amplitude_primary
    * n.semi_amplitude_primary DESC
' for job 'cbf4755e-8523-11f1-982e-bc97e148b76b-O': 3 unresolved identifiers: radius_gspphot [l.66 c.5 - l.66 c.21], radius_gspphot_lower [l.67 c.5 - l.67 c.27], radius_gspphot_upper [l.68 c.5 - l.68 c.27] !
 - Unknown column "g.radius_gspphot" !
 - Unknown column "g.radius_gspphot_lower" !
 - Unknown column "g.radius_gspphot_upper" !
